description: Priority range 1..=4 is hardcoded in two places: src/commands/basic.rs:38 and src/commands/lifecycle.rs:125. Task.priority is u8 on the struct (accepts 0..=255 on load). Extract a single balls::task::parse_priority(&str) -> Result<u8> helper and call it from both sites. Future widening (e.g. 1..=5) then lives in one place. This is prep work that makes task bl-f9db simpler - NOT a behavior change. Keep 1..=4 as the current range.
title: Consolidate priority validation into one helper
